Motion Leave To Intervene
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. PATTY THAMMALAIVIROJ,ESQ. of Chavez Legal Group (Tel: 714-450-1731) appearing via CourtCall for Proposed Intervenor Loya Casualty Insurance Company;
No other appearances made.

Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Proposed Intervenor Loya Casualty Insurance Company's motion for leave to intervene is granted. No opposition filed.

Loya Casualty Insurance Company's Answer-In-Intervention is to be filed no later than 12/5/18.

FORMAL ORDER SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. (302/HK)
